# AA AC Service
> Chennai's specialist commercial AC repair and maintenance company

## Who We Are
AA AC Service is a professional commercial HVAC service provider based in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. We specialise exclusively in commercial AC systems for malls, retail spaces, and large commercial properties — not residential homes.

## What We Do
- **AC Repair**: Fast diagnosis and repair for all commercial AC faults. From ₹999. All brands covered.
- **AC Service & Cleaning**: Deep clean for commercial units. From ₹599. Improves efficiency and air quality.
- **AMC (Annual Maintenance Contract)**: Scheduled preventive maintenance for malls. Plans from ₹4,999/unit/year.
- **Gas Refilling**: R32, R410A, R22 refrigerant top-up and leak detection. From ₹799.

## Current Major Clients
- Nexus Vijaya Mall, Chennai
- Sky One Mall, Chennai
- VR Mall, Chennai
- Phoenix Mall, Chennai

## Key Facts
- Response Time: 2 hours across Chennai (1 hour for AMC Premium clients)
- Coverage: All Chennai areas
- Operating Hours: Monday to Sunday, 8 AM to 8 PM
- Experience: 8+ years
- Rating: 4.9/5 (87 reviews)
- Brands Serviced: Daikin, Voltas, LG, Samsung, Carrier, Blue Star, Hitachi, Trane

## Contact
- Phone: +91 99564 33497
- WhatsApp: +91 81240 00494

- Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

## Pricing Summary
| Service                | Starting Price |
|------------------------|---------------|
| AC Repair              | ₹999          |
| AC Service & Cleaning  | ₹599          |
| Gas Refilling          | ₹799          |
| AMC Basic              | ₹4,999/unit/year |
| AMC Standard           | ₹8,999/unit/year |
| AMC Premium            | ₹14,999/unit/year |

## Why Choose AA AC Service
1. Commercial-only specialists — not a general AC company
2. Mall-grade expertise with real references
3. 2-hour emergency response across Chennai
4. All major brands certified
5. Single AMC contract for multiple AC units
